name: manga-helper
description: A lightweight desktop application for learning Japanese through manga.

scripts.build:app: npm run prestart && npm run build
scripts.build:all: npm run prestart && npm run build && npm run package
scripts.dev:electron: vite & powershell -NoProfile -Command "$env:VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=(Get-Content .vite/deps/temp | Out-String); npm run start"
scripts.prepackage: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Stop-Process -Name 'manga-helper','app-builder','app-builder.exe','electron','node' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; if (Test-Path 'build\win-unpacked') { Remove-Item -LiteralPath 'build\win-unpacked' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }"
